jd_context:
Division: Digital Banking
Unit: Mobile Money Business
Department: Mobile Money
Job Title: Digital Banking Officer
Job Grade: 12.0
Job Objective: To execute the objectives of mobile Money business in maintaining the effectiveness and efficiency of mobile money products and services. To support districts to increase the resource mobilization efforts and to come up with new ideas and solutions to enhance the usage rate of mobile money products and services.
Responsibilities: Propose new idea/modification that will enhance the usage rate of Mobile Money products/services from internal or external customers, vendors, payment scheme, competitors, technology and others;, Conduct need assessment and capacity of the target customer based on the proposed new ideas;, Conduct assessment on Mobile Money products/services features and performance to identify improvement issues;, Develop working procedures & manuals for newly introduced /modified Mobile Money products., Performs and summarize a competitive market intelligence periodically to identify what competitors are doing to improve Mobile Money business;, Prepare proposals, business requirement document (BRD)/ and assessments;, Prepare Mobile Money performance reports;, Initiate, expand and develop different functionalities related to Mobile Money product;, Review collected business sectors payment data;, Conduct periodic risk assessments on Mobile Money products/ services;, Approach & recruits potential third parties as per eligibility criteria;, Explain the product features and values preposition about Mobile Money services; Commercial Bank of Ethiopia Job Description, Before sharing any documents, requests authorized person to sign a non -disclosure agreement (NDA);, Checks application details, re view business requirement documents and fulfillment of all pertinent documents;, Prepare proposal to establish relationship with third party;, Request and arrange test environment as per the new business requirement from Information System division;, Prepare and update user acceptance test cases documents (UAT) based on business requirements;, Conduct test and prepare test result document;, Prepare and update business contract document based on the details of the specific third party integration and forward to legal department for comment and approval;, Communicate contract document to third parties for review and signoff;, Advices the authorized person to fill the account opening/operators application forms & forward it to digital channel management department;, Follow up smooth implementation after go live;, Participates in the preparation of training documents for trainers/trainee;, Delivers training and workshop based on the approved documents;, Performs other duties as assigned.
